DstPolicy.description: Explicit resolution for a nonexistent (spring-forward gap) and an ambiguous (fall-back overlap) wall time. Absence is an error, never a guess.

ExistingEvent.description: The event to reschedule, with already-resolved [start, end) instants.

Instant.description: A UTC instant; the only instant representation.

PolicyProfile.description: Named, versioned policy profile supplying scheduling defaults.

Span.description: Scope of a series edit: a single occurrence, this occurrence and all following, or the whole series.

WallTime.description: Wall-clock calendar components, resolved to an instant only via an explicit time zone + dstPolicy.

description: Move an event to a new start and emit an UPDATE plan (never a write). `newStart` is an Instant or a WallTime; a WallTime newStart and durationPolicy=preserveWallClock both require event.timeZone + dstPolicy.

dstPolicy.description: Required for a wall-clock newStart or for preserveWallClock.

durationPolicy.description: preserveElapsed keeps the real-time length; preserveWallClock keeps the wall-clock length.

newStart.description: The new start, as an Instant (epochMs) or wall-clock components (WallTime).

title: reschedule_event_plan request
